subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated 25 Jamádi'l-Avval was received, and in accordance with thy request, the receipts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ۲۵ جمادی الاول واصل گردید و به موجب خواهش شما قبوضات
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
